breakdown: This PR fixes normalization of rewards_box in streaming passthrough to handle alternative key names ('xp'→'xp_gained', 'gold_pieces'→'gold'). The core fix adds fallback logic to normalize_rewards_box_for_ui and applies it in _resolve_canonical_level_up_ui_pair before persistence. A thorough E2E test verifies the fix works. Minor gaps: no explicit return type annotation on the normalization function and missing docstring.
key_changes: Added fallback key handling in normalize_rewards_box_for_ui: checks 'xp' as fallback for 'xp_gained', 'gold_pieces' as fallback for 'gold'
Added cleanup of raw keys with normalized.pop() after extraction
Applied normalize_rewards_box_for_ui() to passthrough rewards in _resolve_canonical_level_up_ui_pair
Created E2E test test_streaming_passthrough_normalization.py that forces LLM to use non-standard keys and verifies normalization
